name: Drill Beat
description: Dark aggressive drill with sliding 808s, quick build-ups, and relentless drops. UK/NY drill pacing.

sections.name: intro
sections.label: Intro
sections.description: Dark atmospheric pad or melody — eerie mood setter

sections.name: build
sections.label: Build
sections.description: Hi-hats and percs enter — tension ramp

sections.name: drop_1
sections.label: Drop 1
sections.description: Aggressive first drop — sliding 808s hit hard at ~15 seconds

sections.name: verse
sections.label: Verse
sections.description: Main verse groove — hi-hats rolling, bass pattern

sections.name: drop_2
sections.label: Drop 2
sections.description: Bigger second drop — variation on first

sections.name: breakdown
sections.label: Breakdown
sections.description: Half-time feel or stripped back — breathing room
